Question: Considering blood samples taken under various immune conditions and treatment regimes—including fibrotic remodeling with high-dose inhaled steroids measured via gene panel sequencing, tissue-resident memory T cells under a four-week oral steroid taper evaluated by single-cell transcriptomics, and inflammatory monocyte and neutrophil profiles assessed through multi-color flow cytometry in patients receiving intermittent cyclophosphamide or daily mTOR inhibitor therapies—what was the average amount of the drug found circulating in the bloodstream across these different laboratory techniques?

Question: What is the average quantitative bacterial burden (QuantitativeBacterialBurden) across the three specific records: (1) SpecimenSequence = 100000, AccessionSubsystem = "Point-of-care lateral flow accession", AnatomicalReservoir = "peritoneal dialysis effluent", PhenotypicAssayOutcome = "vancomycin MIC creep observed"; (2) SpecimenSequence = 100000, AccessionSubsystem = "Research cohort biobanking accession", AnatomicalReservoir = "skin punch biopsy dermis", PhenotypicAssayOutcome = "heteroresistance detected by population analysis"; and (3) SpecimenSequence = 999999, AccessionSubsystem = "Public health notifiable organisms accession", AnatomicalReservoir = "peritoneal dialysis effluent", PhenotypicAssayOutcome = "vancomycin MIC creep observed"?
SQL Query: SELECT AVG(QuantitativeBacterialBurden) AS QuantitativeBacterialBurden FROM (SELECT QuantitativeBacterialBurden AS QuantitativeBacterialBurden FROM MicrobiologySpecimenAudit WHERE SpecimenSequence = "100000" AND AccessionSubsystem = "Point-of-care lateral flow accession" AND AnatomicalReservoir = "peritoneal dialysis effluent" AND PhenotypicAssayOutcome = "vancomycin MIC creep observed" UNION ALL SELECT QuantitativeBacterialBurden AS QuantitativeBacterialBurden FROM MicrobiologySpecimenAudit WHERE SpecimenSequence = "100000" AND AccessionSubsystem = "Research cohort biobanking accession" AND AnatomicalReservoir = "skin punch biopsy dermis" AND PhenotypicAssayOutcome = "heteroresistance detected by population analysis" UNION ALL SELECT QuantitativeBacterialBurden AS QuantitativeBacterialBurden FROM MicrobiologySpecimenAudit WHERE SpecimenSequence = "999999" AND AccessionSubsystem = "Public health notifiable organisms accession" AND AnatomicalReservoir = "peritoneal dialysis effluent" AND PhenotypicAssayOutcome = "vancomycin MIC creep observed");
